candidates.name: NousResearch/hermes-agent
candidates.title: hermes-agent: Hermes Agent v0.15.1 (2026.5.29)
candidates.description: The agent that grows with you. Patch release published 2026-05-29.
candidates.signal_summary: New release v0.15.1 (2026.5.29), up from v0.14.0 (2026.5.16). 171896 stars, 28857 forks, MIT license. Pushed 2026-05-29.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: The reference agent framework this very registry runs on. New release cadence matters for builders tracking agent infra.

reasons: README or release text tells users to download/run an executable or installer.
Project positioning emphasizes installer download over inspectable source.

candidates.name: anthropics/claude-code
candidates.title: claude-code: v2.1.156
candidates.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster.
candidates.signal_summary: New release v2.1.156, up from v2.1.153. Published 2026-05-29. 127109+ stars.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Core coding agent tool. Release cadence and changelog relevant for builders choosing agent stacks.

candidates.name: the-open-agent/openagent
candidates.title: openagent
candidates.description: Next-generation personal AI assistant powered by LLM, RAG and agent loops. Supports computer-use, browser-use and coding agent.
candidates.signal_summary: Pushed 2026-05-29, 5064 stars, 579 forks, Apache-2.0. Go-based agent framework with MCP topics.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Multi-modal agent framework (computer-use + browser-use + coding). Growing fast, relevant for builders evaluating agent harness options.

candidates.name: openlegion-ai/openlegion
candidates.title: openlegion
candidates.description: Secure autonomous AI agent framework and platform. Build AI teams by describing what you want.
candidates.signal_summary: Pushed 2026-05-29, 98 stars, Python, NOASSERTION license. Topics: agent-framework, docker-sandbox, mcp, multi-agent.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Docker-sandboxed multi-agent orchestration. Relevant for security-conscious builders.

candidates.name: opencue/cuecards
candidates.title: cuecards
candidates.description: Agent profile manager for Claude Code & Codex. Per-directory profiles select which skills, MCP servers, and plugins load automatically before launch.
candidates.signal_summary: Pushed 2026-05-29, 1 star, TypeScript, MIT. Agent profile/skill management for Claude Code and Codex.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Per-directory agent profile selection solves real workflow pain. Low stars but practical.

candidates.name: MadaBurns/bv-mcp
candidates.title: bv-mcp
candidates.description: Open-source DNS & email security scanner. One MCP endpoint, 57 checks, zero install. Cloudflare Workers.
candidates.signal_summary: Pushed 2026-05-29, 7 stars, TypeScript, NOASSERTION. DNS/email security MCP server on Cloudflare Workers.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Security-focused MCP server. 57 checks via one endpoint. Relevant for builders adding security scanning to agent workflows.

candidates.name: promptrails/memoryrails
candidates.title: memoryrails
candidates.description: Agent memory management for Go LLM applications.
candidates.signal_summary: Pushed 2026-05-29, 2 stars, Go, MIT. Agent memory management library.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Go-native agent memory. Growing ecosystem of memory solutions.

candidates.name: wranngle/voice_ai_agent_evals
candidates.title: voice_ai_agent_evals
candidates.description: Eval harness for ElevenLabs voice agents: scenarios, latency, prompt versions.
candidates.signal_summary: Pushed 2026-05-29, 1 star, TypeScript, MIT. Voice agent eval harness.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Voice agent evaluation is a gap in most eval stacks. Niche but useful.

candidates.name: nx-mcp
candidates.title: nx-mcp
candidates.description: A Model Context Protocol server implementation for Nx monorepos.
candidates.signal_summary: npm package nx-mcp v0.25.0, updated 2026-04-30. From Nrwl (Nx team). MIT license.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Official Nx MCP server. Relevant for monorepo-agent integration.

candidates.name: mcp-framework
candidates.title: mcp-framework
candidates.description: Framework for building Model Context Protocol servers in TypeScript.
candidates.signal_summary: npm package mcp-framework. TypeScript MCP server development framework. License not asserted.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Framework for building MCP servers. Useful for builders creating custom MCP tools.

candidates.name: Patdolitse/piia-engram
candidates.title: piia-engram
candidates.description: One memory. Every AI tool. Yours to keep. Local-first, MCP-compatible, Apache 2.0.
candidates.signal_summary: Pushed 2026-05-28, 121 stars, Python, Apache-2.0. Cross-tool local-first AI memory with MCP.
candidates.why_builders_should_care: Cross-tool memory sharing with MCP interface. Strong star count for age.
